headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals CFO’s case for thinking like a portfolio manager
summary: After helping scale Vertex Pharmaceuticals from $3 billion to $13 billion in revenue, CFO and COO Charles Wagner says finance leaders must build organizations for opportunities that haven’t emerged yet.
